_comment: Adversarial 'matching twins' case: two consecutive proof steps share identical sibling_hash but different positions (one 'left', one 'right'). The position discriminator is the load-bearing schema-level invariant that disambiguates the composition trace — without it, a lexicographic-sort heuristic would collapse these to the same step. Industry-standard per RFC 6962 / Bitcoin Merkle. Validates that the schema admits the disambiguation; semantic root verification stays consumer-state per ADR-010.

proposed_series_goals.description: Verify the matching-twins composition trace via the position discriminator.
